namingMismatches: kpi-widget.visual.spec.ts and kpi-error.visual.spec.ts -> kpi public area
table-widget.e2e.ts -> legacy non-Playwright file beside table-widget.e2e.spec.ts
recommendedNextTests: Table runtime sorting, search, selection, paginator, and virtual scroll coverage
Timeseries inspection and zoom menu behavior coverage
Dashboard shell resize, reorder, and below-fold lazy-loading coverage
Time Frame Selection set, undo, clear, and refresh coverage
Proportional interaction and responsive layout coverage
Configurator cancel, submit-error, route-close, and remove-widget coverage
List/drilldown search, back/home, and event semantics coverage
Embedded content and loading/error fallback coverage
Direct Pizzagna, widget-type, and event-proxy contract coverage

areas.name: Dashboard shell / layouts
areas.mainGap: Reorder, lazy-load, resize, and layout reflow are effectively unowned

areas.name: Widget base / common / header / search
areas.mainGap: Remove, reload, collapse, link, and search behavior are largely untested

areas.name: Table Widget
areas.mainGap: Runtime table behavior is far broader than current configurator-focused tests

areas.name: Timeseries Widget
areas.mainGap: Zoom, inspection menu, presets, and transformer correctness are weakly owned

areas.name: Proportional Widget
areas.mainGap: Visual-only; interaction, color, and layout-switch logic are unasserted

areas.name: KPI Widget
areas.mainGap: Visual-only; formatter, interaction, busy, and empty-state branches are untested

areas.name: List Widget / Drilldown
areas.mainGap: Only a visual drill step exists; search, back/home, and event semantics are uncovered

areas.name: Time Frame Selection
areas.mainGap: Set/undo/clear/history and data-source filter registration are untested

areas.name: Configurator / Wizard
areas.mainGap: Huge exported surface is represented mostly by table edit flows and KPI error snapshots

areas.name: Loading / Errors / Embedded Content
areas.mainGap: Sanitization, loading, fallback, and widget error presentation lack owned tests

areas.name: Pizzagna / Widget Types / Directives
areas.mainGap: Dynamic composition and registry contracts are exercised only incidentally

areas.name: Services / Providers / Common / Functions / Constants
areas.mainGap: Exported registries, adapters, handlers, and helpers have almost no component-owned E2E accountability
